metadata.title: Vision Enforcement: Hard Gates Against Architecture Bypass
metadata.goal: Make it physically impossible to train outside Docker without an explicit test-only escape hatch

phase.name: Hard Gates
phase.description: Code-level enforcement that PREVENTS wrong execution paths. After this phase, `training_flow()` raises RuntimeError when called outside Docker. `.sh` scripts invoke Docker, not bare Python.

task.name: Docker context detection in train_flow
task.description: Add `_require_docker_context()` check at the top of `training_flow()`. Raises RuntimeError if not running inside Docker container. Escape hatch: `MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1` for pytest only.
task.test-first: tests/unit/orchestration/test_docker_context_gate.py: - test_training_flow_raises_outside_docker: No /.dockerenv, no env var → RuntimeError - test_training_flow_runs_inside_docker: /.dockerenv exists → no error - test_training_flow_runs_with_allow_host: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 → no error - test_allow_host_only_in_tests: Verify MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST not in any .sh script
task.acceptance: `uv run python -c "from minivess.orchestration.flows.train_flow import training_flow; training_flow(debug=True)"` raises RuntimeError with Docker instructions (not inside container).

task.name: Rewrite train_sam3_vanilla.sh to use Docker
task.description: Replace bare `uv run python` with `docker compose -f deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml run`. Remove PREFECT_DISABLED=1. Pass SAM3-specific params via environment variables.
task.test-first: tests/unit/scripts/test_sh_scripts_use_docker.py: - test_no_bare_python_in_training_scripts: Parse all scripts/*.sh, verify none contain `uv run python` for training (allow for utility scripts like linting) - test_no_prefect_disabled_in_scripts: Grep scripts/*.sh for PREFECT_DISABLED=1 - test_training_scripts_invoke_docker: Verify `docker compose` or `docker run` present
task.acceptance: `scripts/train_sam3_vanilla.sh` runs `docker compose ... run train` with proper environment overrides for SAM3 (model_family, loss_name, etc.).

task.name: Checkpoint path validation in SegmentationTrainer
task.description: SegmentationTrainer.__init__ or fit() validates that checkpoint_dir is either: - Under /app/checkpoints (Docker standard path) - A pytest tmp_path (contains 'pytest' or 'tmp' in path) - Explicitly allowed via MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 Repo-relative paths like `checkpoints/` or `./checkpoints` are rejected.
task.test-first: tests/unit/pipeline/test_checkpoint_path_validation.py: - test_rejects_repo_relative_path: `checkpoint_dir=Path("checkpoints")` → ValueError - test_accepts_docker_path: `checkpoint_dir=Path("/app/checkpoints/fold_0")` → OK - test_accepts_pytest_tmp_path: `checkpoint_dir=tmp_path / "fold_0"` → OK - test_accepts_with_allow_host: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 → any path OK

task.name: Update Dockerfile.train for SAM3 dependencies
task.description: Verify Dockerfile.train includes transformers>=5.2.0 and torchvision (required for SAM3). Add HF_TOKEN passthrough. Test that the image builds and can import Sam3Model.
task.test-first: Manual: `docker build -t minivess-train:test -f deployment/docker/Dockerfile.train .` must succeed. Then: `docker run minivess-train:test python -c "from transformers import Sam3Model; print('OK')"`
task.acceptance: Docker image builds, SAM3 imports work, `docker compose run train` starts.

phase.name: Automated Guards
phase.description: CI and pre-commit hooks that catch violations before they reach main.

task.name: Pre-commit hook: no PREFECT_DISABLED in scripts
task.description: Add a local pre-commit hook that greps .sh files for PREFECT_DISABLED=1 and fails if found. Only allowed in tests/ and conftest files.
task.acceptance: `git commit` with a .sh file containing PREFECT_DISABLED=1 fails pre-commit.

task.name: CI: Docker build gate on PR
task.description: Add a GitHub Actions job that builds Dockerfile.train on every PR that touches src/ or deployment/. If the training image can't build, PR fails.
task.acceptance: PR touching src/minivess/adapters/ triggers Docker build check.

task.name: AST test: .sh scripts invoke Docker
task.description: Extend test_sh_scripts_use_docker.py to parse ALL .sh scripts in scripts/ and verify that any script containing training-related keywords (train, training_flow, model_family) uses `docker compose` or `docker run`.

task.name: Pre-commit hook: no repo-relative checkpoint paths
task.description: A pre-commit hook or AST test that scans Python files for `CHECKPOINT_DIR=checkpoints` or `checkpoint_dir=Path("checkpoints")` patterns outside of test files.

phase.name: Integration Tests
phase.description: Tests that verify the ACTUAL training path works end-to-end through Docker. Not mocked — real Docker, real (tiny) data, real model.

task.name: Docker smoke test: debug training in container
task.description: Integration test that: 1. Builds minivess-train Docker image 2. Runs `docker compose run train` with debug=True, max_epochs=1, num_folds=1 3. Verifies checkpoint exists at /app/checkpoints/ (inside container) 4. Verifies MLflow run exists and is FINISHED 5. Verifies Prefect was active (not compat mode) Requires: Docker, NVIDIA runtime, SAM3 weights (skip in CI without GPU).
task.acceptance: Full training cycle completes inside Docker container with proper volume mounts.

task.name: Volume mount compliance test
task.description: Parse docker-compose.flows.yml and verify: - Every service that writes artifacts has volume mounts - All declared ENV paths (CHECKPOINT_DIR, MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI, etc.) map to volume-mounted directories - No service uses /tmp for persistent output

phase.name: Documentation Hardening
phase.description: Update CLAUDE.md with the STOP protocol rule and strengthen the existing rules to be more specific and actionable.

task.name: Add STOP Protocol to CLAUDE.md Critical Rules
task.description: Add Rule #19: STOP Protocol Before Execution. Before ANY training/pipeline execution, verify: S(ource in Docker), T(racking via Prefect), O(utputs volume-mounted), P(rovenance reproducible). Reference: docs/planning/minivess-vision-enforcement-plan.md

task.name: Update MEMORY.md with enforcement context
task.description: Add to MEMORY.md: - The STOP protocol as a session-start checklist - "Architecture IS the product" reminder - Docker infrastructure already exists (Dockerfile.train, docker-compose.flows.yml) - Direct link to enforcement plan

task.name: Update Activation Checklist
task.description: Add STOP protocol verification to the self-learning-iterative-coder ACTIVATION-CHECKLIST.md. Any task involving training/pipeline execution must pass STOP before entering the RED phase.

task.name: Create P0 GitHub Issue
task.description: Create a P0 issue documenting this failure and linking to the enforcement plan. Label: architecture, P0, docker, prefect. Title: "CRITICAL: Enforce Docker-per-flow execution — training runs outside Docker"
task.acceptance: Issue created on GitHub with full context and task checklist.

dep.reason: Script needs Docker gate to test against
Hook enforces pattern established in T-01
Smoke test needs working Docker image
Smoke test verifies Docker gate works

execution-order.step: Docker gate + Dockerfile fix + CLAUDE.md update (independent, do first)
Rewrite .sh script + checkpoint validation + activation checklist
Pre-commit hooks + CI gates + AST tests
Integration tests (require Docker build from step 1)
Create P0 GitHub Issue (after plan is committed)

success-criteria.criterion: `training_flow()` raises RuntimeError when called outside Docker (without MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1).
All .sh training scripts invoke `docker compose run`, not `uv run python`.
CI builds Dockerfile.train on every PR touching src/.
Integration test verifies end-to-end Docker training with volume mounts.
Zero instances of shortcut training in the next 10 AI sessions.
